evals.prompt: I want to set up intent-based prospecting in ZoomInfo. I sell cybersecurity software to mid-market companies. How do I find accounts showing buying intent and get the right contacts?
evals.expected_output: Step-by-step guide covering intent topic configuration, building a Saved Search with ICP + intent filters, using Recommended Contacts, and setting up alerts

assertions.name: intent_topics
assertions.description: Must explain how to configure intent topics in ZoomInfo admin and that topics are subscription-dependent

assertions.name: saved_search
assertions.description: Must describe creating a Saved Search combining ICP filters (mid-market, cybersecurity-relevant industries) with intent spike signals

assertions.name: recommended_contacts
assertions.description: Must mention using Recommended Contacts or Org Charts to find decision-makers at spiking accounts

evals.prompt: We have 20,000 contacts in Salesforce with missing phone numbers and outdated job titles. How do I use ZoomInfo OperationsOS to clean this up and keep it fresh going forward?
evals.expected_output: Guidance on bulk enrichment via OperationsOS, deduplication, auto-enrich rules, and credit management for large-scale operations

assertions.name: bulk_enrichment
assertions.description: Must describe the bulk enrichment process — either in-platform or via API — for refreshing 20K stale records

assertions.name: auto_enrich
assertions.description: Must recommend setting up auto-enrich rules or data orchestration workflows to prevent future data decay

assertions.name: credit_warning
assertions.description: Must warn about credit consumption at scale and recommend monitoring usage via the Usage API or dashboard

evals.prompt: I'm building a custom lead scoring system and need to pull ZoomInfo enrichment data via API whenever a new lead is created in our system. Walk me through the API setup.
evals.expected_output: Technical guide covering authentication (PKI), Contact Enrich endpoint, token refresh, rate limits, and credit tracking

assertions.name: authentication
assertions.description: Must explain PKI authentication method with Client ID + Private Key, and that JWT expires every 60 minutes requiring refresh logic

assertions.name: enrich_endpoint
assertions.description: Must describe the POST /enrich/contact endpoint with matchPersonInput format and outputFields parameter

assertions.name: rate_limits
assertions.description: Must mention rate limits (25 req/s for standard APIs) and the X-RateLimit-Remaining header for monitoring
